## Blast radius of `common/src/paths.rs`

The graph shows `PathManager` (`common/src/paths.rs:13`, degree 25) is a god-node abstraction exposing ~24 path-resolution methods (`default_root`, `with_root`, `project_root`, `shard_db`, `wal_path`, `snapshot_dir`/`_at`/`_by_id`, `cache_root`, `docs_cache`, `embed_cache`, `multimodal_cache`, `llm_dir`, `bin_dir`, `crash_dir`, `supervisor_log/_socket`, `livebus_socket`, `store_socket`, `meta_db`, `resolve_default_root`, `try_default_root`, `default`). Almost every binary in the workspace funnels through it, so the blast radius is wide.

### Production source â€” must update + retest

**`common/` (the home crate):**
- `common/src/worker_ipc.rs` â€” `discover_socket_path()` calls `.default_root()` for socket discovery.

**`cli/` core (3 files):**
- `cli/src/lib.rs` â€” `runtime_dir()` L111, `state_dir()` L127.
- `cli/src/main.rs` â€” `launch_mcp()` L243.
- `cli/src/hook_writer.rs` â€” `.resolve()` L110.
- `cli/src/ipc.rs` â€” `.default_path()` L439.
- `cli/src/receipts.rs` â€” `receipts_dir()` L303.
- `cli/src/skill_matcher.rs` â€” `candidate_skill_dirs()` L92.

**`cli/src/commands/` (every subcommand that touches state):**
- `build.rs` â€” `run()`, `run_inline()`, `run_dispatched()`, `fixture_store()`.
- `audit.rs` â€” `run_direct_subprocess_with_registry()`, `resolve_scanners_binary()`.
- `blast.rs` â€” `paths_graph_db()` L165.

- `uninstall.rs` â€” `run()`, `purge_mneme_state()`.
- `install.rs` â€” `drop_standalone_uninstaller()`.
- `cache.rs` â€” `run_du`, `run_prune`, `run_gc`, `run_drop`.
- `drift.rs`, `status.rs`, `step.rs` â€” each have `direct_db_fallback()` calling `.default_root()`.
- `history.rs`, `abort.rs`, `snap.rs`, `graphify.rs`, `rebuild.rs` â€” each `run()` resolves the root.
- `why.rs` â€” `cmd_why()`.
- `federated.rs` â€” `open_store()`, `optin_marker()`.
- `models.rs` â€” `model_root()`.
- `doctor.rs` â€” `mcp_entry_path()` L854.

**`supervisor/`:**
- `supervisor/src/lib.rs` â€” `logs_dir()` L87.
- `supervisor/src/api_graph.rs` â€” heavy consumer: `.from_defaults()`, `build_router`, `with_layer_db_sync`, `find_active_layer_db`, every `api_graph_*` handler (nodes, status, heatmap, file_tree, hierarchy, layers, galaxy_3d, theme_palette, community_matrix, domain_flow, test_coverage), `test_filename_candidates`, `domain_of`, `tier_of`, `insert_into_hierarchy`.

### Test files â€” must be re-run

- `common/tests/mneme_home_override.rs` â€” the canonical override-contract suite (12+ tests: `cli_runtime_dir_pattern_lands_under_override`, `cli_state_dir_pattern_lands_under_override`, `cli_supervisor_pipe_discovery_lands_under_override`, `cli_mcp_entry_path_pattern_lands_under_override`, `cli_audit_scanners_path_lands_under_override`, `cli_models_root_pattern_lands_under_override`, `cli_snap_dir_pattern_lands_under_override`, `cli_uninstall_bin_pattern_lands_under_override`, `cli_install_uninstaller_drop_pattern_lands_under_override`, `cli_skill_matcher_plugin_skills_lands_under_override`, `cli_receipts_dir_lands_under_override`, `supervisor_jobs_db_pattern_lands_under_override`, `brain_embed_cache_pattern_lands_under_override`, `brain_llm_model_pattern_lands_under_override`, `empty_mneme_home_falls_back_to_dirs_home`, `path_manager_default_root_returns_override_verbatim`).
- `cli/tests/doctor_paths.rs` â€” `mneme_root_paths_share_single_dotted_segment`, `mcp_entry_path_is_under_home_mneme_mcp`, `mcp_entry_path_is_absolute_when_home_resolves`, `expected_binaries_*`.
- `cli/tests/chaos_tests.rs` â€” `upgrade_v02_to_v03_schema_is_additive_only` L846 uses `.with_root()` for fixture roots.
- `cli/tests/rebuild_integration.rs` â€” `rebuild_lock_contention_exits_with_code_4` L42, `rebuild_round_trip_preserves_node_count` L110.
- `supervisor/src/api_graph.rs` (in-file tests) â€” `test_state`, `state_with_bus`, `api_health_returns_200_json`, `api_daemon_health_returns_200_json`, `api_projects_empty_when_dir_missing`, `api_voice_returns_stub_payload`, `api_graph_file_tree_builds_hierarchy_from_fixture`, `api_graph_heatmap_returns_severity_keys_when_no_shard`, `api_graph_community_matrix_empty_when_no_shard`, `api_graph_theme_palette_empty_when_no_shard`, `api_graph_domain_flow_empty_when_no_shard`.
- `cli/src/commands/inject.rs` (in-file test) â€” `build_recall_context_block_returns_empty_on_missing_shards` L1141.
- `store/src/query.rs` (in-file test) â€” `write_returns_timeout_when_writer_channel_full` L474.
- `store/src/builder.rs` â€” `fresh_paths()` is the test fixture used across the store crate's tests.

### Reasoning summary

Each file above appears as a direct caller (`calls`/`method` edge) of either `PathManager` itself or one of its public methods in the graph. `.default_root()` alone has 60+ inbound edges, making it the central choke point â€” any signature change there cascades through every binary. `.with_root()` is the test-fixture entry point; changing it breaks every integration/fixture test in `cli/tests/`, `store/`, and `supervisor/`. `common/tests/mneme_home_override.rs` is the de-facto contract test suite for this module and must always re-run.

### Caveats

- The graph contains 90% EXTRACTED / 10% INFERRED edges, and `paths.rs` itself returned no node by exact label (only methods/`PathManager`), so a few callers reached only via re-exports may be missing. The `common/tests/mneme_home_override.rs` file is the safety net that catches anything I missed â€” re-running it is the minimum bar.
- The graph cannot tell which methods are *public* vs `pub(crate)`; I treated everything reachable from outside the crate as public surface.
